fields.name: reconciled_payment_ids
fields.help_text: Payments that have been reconciled with this invoice.

fields.name: tax_cash_basis_origin_move_id
fields.help_text: The journal entry from which this tax cash basis journal entry has been created.

fields.name: tax_cash_basis_created_move_ids
fields.help_text: The cash basis entries created from the taxes on this entry, when reconciling its lines.

fields.name: auto_post
fields.help_text: Specify whether this entry is posted automatically on its accounting date, and any similar recurring invoices.

fields.name: auto_post_until
fields.help_text: This recurring move will be posted up to and including this date.

fields.name: checked
fields.help_text: If this checkbox is not ticked, it means that the user was not sure of all the related information at the time of the creation of the move and that the move needs to be checked again.

fields.name: secured
fields.help_text: The entry is secured with an inalterable hash.

fields.name: partner_shipping_id
fields.help_text: The delivery address will be used in the computation of the fiscal position.

fields.name: partner_bank_id
fields.help_text: Bank Account Number to which the invoice will be paid. A Company bank account if this is a Customer Invoice or Vendor Credit Note, otherwise a Partner bank account number.

fields.name: fiscal_position_id
fields.help_text: Fiscal positions are used to adapt taxes and accounts for particular customers or sales orders/invoices. The default value comes from the customer.

fields.name: payment_reference
fields.help_text: The payment reference to set on journal items.

fields.name: qr_code_method
fields.help_text: Type of QR-code to be generated for the payment of this invoice, when printing it. If left blank, the first available and usable method will be used.

fields.name: invoice_currency_rate
fields.help_text: Currency rate from company currency to document currency.

fields.name: direction_sign
fields.help_text: Multiplicator depending on the document type, to convert a price into a balance

fields.name: tax_totals
fields.help_text: Edit Tax amounts if you encounter rounding issues.

fields.name: invoice_vendor_bill_id
fields.help_text: Auto-complete from a past bill.

fields.name: quick_edit_total_amount
fields.help_text:
Use this field to encode the total amount of the invoice.
Odoo will automatically create one invoice line with default values to match it.

fields.name: is_move_sent
fields.help_text: It indicates that the invoice/payment has been sent or the PDF has been generated.

fields.name: is_being_sent
fields.help_text: Is the move being sent asynchronously

fields.name: invoice_origin
fields.help_text: The document(s) that generated the invoice.

fields.name: invoice_incoterm_id
fields.help_text: International Commercial Terms are a series of predefined commercial terms used in international transactions.

fields.name: invoice_cash_rounding_id
fields.help_text: Defines the smallest coinage of the currency that can be used to pay by cash.

fields.name: bank_partner_id
fields.help_text: Technical field to get the domain on the bank

fields.name: is_storno
fields.help_text: Utility field to express whether the journal item is subject to storno accounting

fields.name: cumulated_balance
fields.help_text: Cumulated balance depending on the domain and the order chosen in the view.

fields.name: currency_rate
fields.help_text: Currency rate from company currency to document currency.

fields.name: amount_currency
fields.help_text: The amount expressed in an optional other currency if it is a multi-currency entry.

fields.name: payment_id
fields.help_text: The payment that created this entry

fields.name: statement_line_id
fields.help_text: The statement line that created this entry

fields.name: statement_id
fields.help_text: The bank statement used for bank reconciliation

fields.name: tax_line_id
fields.help_text: Indicates that this journal item is a tax line

fields.name: tax_repartition_line_id
fields.help_text: Tax distribution line that caused the creation of this move line, if any

fields.name: tax_tag_ids
fields.help_text: Tags assigned to this line by the tax creating it, if any. It determines its impact on financial reports.

fields.name: amount_residual
fields.help_text: The residual amount on a journal item expressed in the company currency.

fields.name: amount_residual_currency
fields.help_text: The residual amount on a journal item expressed in its currency (possibly not the company currency).

fields.name: matched_debit_ids
fields.help_text: Debit journal items that are matched with this journal item.

fields.name: matched_credit_ids
fields.help_text: Credit journal items that are matched with this journal item.

fields.name: matching_number
fields.help_text: Matching number for this line, 'P' if it is only partially reconcile, or the name of the full reconcile if it exists.

fields.name: quantity
fields.help_text: The optional quantity expressed by this line, eg: number of product sold. The quantity is not a legal requirement but is very useful for some reports.

fields.name: date_maturity
fields.help_text: This field is used for payable and receivable journal entries. You can put the limit date for the payment of this line.

fields.name: discount_date
fields.help_text: Last date at which the discounted amount must be paid in order for the Early Payment Discount to be granted
